summary: Iteration 51 - 360° Angle Regenerate Button Feature Testing. All 6 features tested successfully via Playwright UI testing. When editing an avatar via Edit button, the 360° View tab shows previously saved angles as images with regenerate buttons appearing on hover.

FEATURE_1_360_view_shows_saved_angles.details: When editing avatar via Edit button, 360° View tab shows previously saved angles as images. Test confirmed: angle-front (hasImage: True), angle-left_profile (hasImage: True), angle-right_profile (hasImage: False - not generated), angle-back (hasImage: False - not generated)

FEATURE_2_regenerate_button_on_hover.details: Each existing angle thumbnail shows a regenerate button (refresh icon) on hover. Button opacity changes from 0 (hidden) to 1 (visible) on hover. Confirmed: {exists: true, opacity: '1', visible: true, width: 20, height: 20, hasRefreshIcon: true}

FEATURE_3_regenerate_button_data_testid.details: Regenerate buttons have correct data-testid format: regen-angle-{angle_id}. Confirmed for front and left_profile angles.

FEATURE_4_click_angle_sets_main_preview.details: Clicking an existing angle image sets it as the main preview. Test confirmed: Initial preview was 'Avatar1', after clicking left_profile angle, preview changed to 'Left' image URL with green color.

FEATURE_5_ungenerated_angles_show_placeh.details: Angles that haven't been generated (right_profile, back) show the RotateCw placeholder icon and can generate on click.

FEATURE_6_edit_save_buttons_work.details: Modal footer displays 'Save as New' (+ icon) and 'Update' (checkmark icon) buttons when editing existing avatar - same as iteration_50.

seed_data_creation: Test avatar seeded via localStorage (key: agentzz_avatars) with id 'test_avatar_angles_1' containing pre-populated angles: {front, left_profile}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51: All 360° Angle Regenerate features verified working. Route: /marketing/studio. Key data-testids: edit-avatar-{id}, angle-{angle_id} (front, left_profile, right_profile, back), regen-angle-{angle_id}. The regenerate button uses group-hover/angle CSS class so it appears on parent hover. Button has RefreshCw icon and calls generateAngle(angle_id, true) with forceRegenerate=true. Angles are stored in avatar.angles object in localStorage.

mocked_apis.note: Avatar data stored in localStorage. Actual angle regeneration calls /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-avatar-variant but UI button behavior was verified without making actual API calls.
